overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the player character walking through ancient Athens at night, transitioning from public streets into Perikles's private residence. The scene features classical Greek architecture with stone pathways, columns, and torch-lit gardens under a clear starry sky.

approaching the guarded stone gate entrance to Perikles's Residence

cobblestone street surface with irregular stone tiles

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through the streets of ancient Athens at night, accompanied by a female NPC in a white dress. They pass a dog on the right and approach a stone gate archway where guards stand with torches. Classical Greek buildings line the street, and the cobblestone path reflects the torchlight.

events.description: entering the stone archway gate into Perikles's private residence
walking between two armed guards holding burning torches at the gate

agents.ego_description: passing through the guarded gate into the private residence, moving between torch-bearing guards

notable_agents.action: armed guard in armor holding a burning torch at the gate entrance
armed guard in armor holding a burning torch at the gate entrance

entered.detail: iron stand holding a burning torch illuminating the gate entrance
iron stand holding a burning torch illuminating the gate entrance
covered walkway with stone columns leading into the residence gardens

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the stone archway into Perikles's Residence, walking between two guards holding torches. The space becomes more enclosed as they leave the public street behind and enter the private grounds, with a covered colonnade visible ahead.

events.description: entering the covered colonnade garden area with stone columns and benches
moving deeper into the torch-lit covered walkway with shadows cast by columns

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone pathway beneath the covered colonnade, passing between rows of columns and garden beds

entered.detail: tall fluted stone column supporting the covered roof structure
tall fluted stone column supporting the covered roof structure
stone bench positioned against the garden wall
stone bench positioned against the garden wall
dense bushes and plants lining the colonnade walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the serene, torch-lit colonnade of Perikles's Residence, surrounded by stone columns and garden shrubbery. The covered walkway creates a sheltered atmosphere with warm torchlight contrasting against the cool night sky visible through the roof openings.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner residence garden with high walls

events.description: slight right turn along the colonnade path as the walkway curves
approaching a more enclosed garden section with higher stone walls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the residence garden pathway, passing stone benches and walls illuminated by torchlight

entered.detail: high stone wall enclosing the garden area with decorative trim
dense green shrubbery planted along the wall base
dense green shrubbery planted along the wall base

segments.scene_description: The pathway curves slightly to the right through a more enclosed section of the garden, with high stone walls on both sides and dense shrubbery. The player continues walking past stone benches and torch stands, moving deeper into the private residence grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with trees and gravel paths

events.description: exiting the covered colonnade into an open courtyard area
ground surface changes from stone tiles to gravel pathway

agents.ego_description: walking into the open courtyard area with gravel ground, approaching a large central tree and wooden structures

entered.detail: gravel and dirt pathway surface replacing the stone tiles
large mature tree with spreading branches in the courtyard center
wooden structure with red roof tiles visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered colonnade into an open courtyard with a gravel path and a large olive tree in the center. The space opens up to the night sky, with wooden pavilion structures visible to the right and stone walls continuing to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the public streets of ancient Athens into the secluded, torch-lit sanctuary of Perikles's private residence. It begins on a cobblestone street where the player and a female companion pass a dog and approach a stone gate guarded by torch-bearers. As they pass through the archway, the environment shifts from the open city to a more enclosed space, leading the camera through a serene colonnade where warm torchlight contrasts with the cool night sky. The path then curves through a sheltered garden section flanked by high stone walls and dense shrubbery before finally emerging into an open courtyard centered around a large olive tree.
